author: maxine--futura
content: Plan: The Python types in _lexicon_types.py already have ShardManifestRef (line 121) and manifests: list[ShardManifestRef] | None (line 703) on DatasetEntryRecord. The lexicon JSON entry.json is missing the manifests property. Need to: 1) Add shardManifestRef def to entry.json, 2) Add optional manifests array referencing it, 3) Verify round-trip with existing tests.
